meta.question: Is there any cyclic behaviour in this model? (Model ID: 2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc)
meta.finalAnswer:
Yes, the model (ID: 2d225c9ff86b443c9f6bc6cfe687afbc) contains cyclic behavior. Several nodes within the choreography are part of cycles, including:
- Qualitätskontrolle durchführen
- Anzahl überprüfen
- i = 3 ?
- Probe ausliefern
- Herstellungsprozess einleiten
- Ursachen analysieren
- Reklamation senden
